---
title: "Siddharth Singh"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: best.JPG
---

I am a Statistics and Data Science student at UCLA with a minor in Data Science Engineering, interested in machine learning, data engineering, and applied analytics. My work spans research, data journalism, and industry projects in healthcare, sports, and automotive systems.

## Highlights

**Lucid Motors:** Built Python automation and validation tools for OTA software workflows, improving efficiency and speeding validation.

**UCLA Bionics Lab:** Developed deep learning and data augmentation pipelines for automated stroke assessment using multimodal sensor data.

**Bruin Sports Analytics:** Lead data journalism and research projects using statistical modeling and machine learning for sports analysis.

## Quick Links

[Resume](SiddharthSingh.pdf){target="_blank"}\
[GitHub](https://github.com/siddharthsingh2004){target="_blank"}\
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/siddharthsinghucla/){target="_blank"}\
[Email](mailto:siddharth2004@g.ucla.edu){target="_blank"}
